_comment: AgentGuard MCP Gateway config for Zed. Source: https://zed.dev/docs/ai/mcp.html (verified 2026-05-05). Zed calls MCP servers 'context servers' and stores them under the top-level context_servers key inside its main settings.json — NOT inside an mcpServers map. See zed-config.md for the settings.json file path. Do NOT pass --api-key '$AGENTGUARD_API_KEY' literally — Zed does not shell-expand $VAR in JSON args. Inject the key via the env block; the gateway reads AGENTGUARD_API_KEY from the environment when the --api-key flag is absent. v0.5 is single-tenant: --tenant-id must be 'local'.
